name: All Purpose Cleaner Spray
desc: Versatile everyday cleaner that cuts through grease, grime and dirt on all hard surfaces. Safe for kitchen counters, bathroom tiles, appliances and more.
benefits: Ready to use – no dilution needed

name: Floor Cleaner Concentrate
desc: High-concentration floor cleaner that leaves floors sparkling clean and streak-free. Suitable for tiles, vinyl, laminate and sealed hardwood floors.
benefits: Works on all sealed floor types

name: Bathroom Tile & Grout Cleaner
desc: Powerful acid-based cleaner that dissolves soap scum, limescale and mould stains from tiles and grout lines. Restores grout to its original white colour.

name: Fabric Freshener Spray
desc: Eliminates odours from fabrics, upholstery and soft furnishings on contact. Leaves a long-lasting fresh fragrance without washing.

name: Heavy Duty Degreaser
desc: Industrial-strength degreaser for removing heavy oil, grease and carbon deposits from machinery, workshop floors and equipment. Fast-acting solvent formula.

name: Industrial Floor Stripper
desc: Professional-grade floor stripper for removing old wax, sealers and coatings from concrete, vinyl and tiled floors. Used by cleaning contractors nationwide.

name: Engine Bay Cleaner
desc: Penetrating degreaser formulated specifically for engine bays and mechanical components. Safely dissolves grime, oil and road tar without damaging plastic or rubber parts.

name: Industrial Solvent Cleaner
desc: Multi-purpose industrial solvent for cleaning adhesives, resins, paint overspray and stubborn industrial contamination. Suitable for metal, glass and most hard surfaces.

name: Tyre & Dashboard Shine
desc: Premium shine spray that gives tyres and dashboards a deep, long-lasting gloss. Water-repellent formula protects against UV fading and cracking.

name: Car Interior Cleaner
desc: Gentle yet effective spray cleaner for all car interior surfaces including seats, door panels, carpet and plastic trim. Leaves a clean, non-greasy finish.

name: Leather Seat Conditioner
desc: Nourishing conditioner that cleans, softens and protects leather car seats. Restores natural suppleness and prevents cracking and fading.

name: Car Air Freshener Spray
desc: Long-lasting car air freshener that neutralises odours and fills your car with a fresh, clean fragrance. Available in Ocean Breeze scent.

name: Premium Car Wash Shampoo
desc: High-suds car wash shampoo that safely lifts dirt and road grime without stripping wax. Highly concentrated – one cap per bucket.

name: Tar & Adhesive Remover
desc: Effortlessly dissolves tar spots, road tar, tree sap and adhesive residue from paintwork, glass and chrome without scratching.

name: Bumper Black Restorer
desc: Restores faded, grey plastic bumpers and trim to a deep, rich black finish that lasts months. Water-based formula with UV inhibitors.

name: Waterless Car Wash Spray
desc: Clean and polish your car without water. Encapsulates dirt particles and wipes away cleanly, leaving a streak-free shine in minutes.

name: Auto Spot Cleaner
desc: Targeted spot cleaner for removing stubborn stains, bird droppings and insect residue from vehicle paintwork without damaging the surface.

name: Bumper Black
desc: Professional-grade liquid formula that instantly restores faded plastic bumpers and exterior trim to a deep, rich black finish.

name: Chassis Black (Water Based)
desc: Water-based black chassis coating that protects the underbody from rust, corrosion and road debris. Easy to apply and environmentally friendly.

name: Concentrated Cleaner & Degreaser
desc: Heavy-duty concentrated cleaner and degreaser for removing oil, grease and road grime from vehicle exteriors, engines and wheels.

name: De-Wax
desc: Powerful de-waxing solution that strips old wax, polish and silicone residue from paintwork, preparing the surface for fresh wax or paint correction.

name: Engine Cleaner (Solvent Based)
desc: Solvent-based engine cleaner that rapidly dissolves heavy grease, oil build-up and carbon deposits from engine components and bay surfaces.

name: Engine Cleaner (Waterbased)
desc: Water-based engine cleaner for safely removing grease and grime from engine bays. Biodegradable formula safe for use near drains and environmentally sensitive areas.

name: Tar Remover
desc: Fast-acting tar remover that dissolves road tar, bitumen, and adhesive contamination from painted surfaces, glass and alloy wheels without scratching.

name: Overall Washing Powders
desc: Heavy-duty industrial washing powder for laundering overalls, workwear and uniforms. Powerful formulation removes oil, grease and industrial soiling from heavy-duty fabrics.

name: Alubrite
desc: Specialist aluminium brightener and cleaner that removes oxidation, tarnish and corrosion from aluminium surfaces. Restores a bright, polished finish without abrasives.

name: HF Alubrite
desc: High-foam aluminium brightener for truck and transport cleaning applications. Produces rich foam for improved contact time and superior brightening on aluminium tankers and trailers.

name: Anti-Freeze Concentrate 96%
desc: High-concentration 96% anti-freeze and coolant for industrial and automotive cooling systems. Prevents freezing, boilover and corrosion in all engine types. Dilute to required protection level.

name: Hand Cleaner Paste - Grit
desc: Waterless grit hand cleaner paste that removes stubborn grease, oil, tar and industrial soiling from hands without water. Natural grit particles provide gentle exfoliation while cleaning.

name: Bio Degreaser Specialised
desc: Biodegradable industrial degreaser formulated with specialist surfactants for breaking down heavy oil and grease contamination. Environmentally responsible and drain-safe.

name: Eco Degreaser HD Red
desc: Heavy-duty eco-friendly degreaser in distinctive red formulation for high-visibility identification. Tackles industrial grease and oil with powerful surfactant action while minimising environmental impact.

name: HD Degreaser
desc: Professional heavy-duty degreaser concentrate for removing extreme oil, grease and contamination from industrial machinery, floors and equipment. Dilute for varied cleaning strengths.

name: NR Solvent Degreaser
desc: Non-residue solvent degreaser that evaporates cleanly without leaving any film or residue. Ideal for electrical components, precision parts and surfaces where contamination-free cleaning is critical.

name: Truck Shampoo
desc: Heavy-duty truck and fleet washing shampoo that rapidly removes road grime, diesel soot and traffic film from large vehicles. High-foam concentrate safe on all vehicle finishes.

name: Window DAE-Scaler
desc: Industrial descaler and acid-based glass cleaner that dissolves mineral deposits, hard water scale and silica staining from windows, glass panels and glazing. Leaves streak-free clarity.

name: Alkaline Washing Powders
desc: High-alkaline industrial washing powder for laundry and parts washing applications. Powerful cleaning action removes heavy soiling, carbonised deposits and industrial contamination.

name: Hand Sanitiser Gel 70%
desc: WHO-formulated hand sanitiser with 70% ethanol that kills 99.9% of bacteria and viruses. Quick-drying, non-sticky gel with added moisturiser.

name: Surface Disinfectant Spray
desc: Hospital-grade disinfectant spray that kills 99.9% of bacteria, fungi and enveloped viruses on contact. Ideal for homes, offices and healthcare facilities.

name: Isopropyl Alcohol 99%
desc: Ultra-pure 99% isopropyl alcohol for electronics cleaning, laboratory use and surface sterilisation. Leaves no residue – safe for PCBs and sensitive equipment.

name: Anti-Bacterial Foam Hand Wash
desc: Rich foaming hand wash with anti-bacterial agents that kill 99.9% of germs while keeping hands soft and moisturised. Dermatologically tested.

name: Auto Gloss
desc: High-shine auto gloss that buffs to a brilliant finish on dashboards, door panels and all interior plastic surfaces. Long-lasting protective coating.

name: Dashboard Polish
desc: Premium dashboard polish that cleans, shines and protects all interior plastic and vinyl surfaces. Leaves a non-greasy satin finish that resists dust.

name: Dashboard Polish (Bulk)
desc: Bulk-size dashboard polish for professional detailers and workshops. Cleans, shines and protects all interior plastic and vinyl surfaces with a dust-resistant finish.

name: Leather Conditioner Cream
desc: Rich cream formula that deeply nourishes and restores leather car seats, steering wheels and door panels. Prevents cracking, fading and stiffness.

name: Ultimate 4in1 Leather Treatment *Premium*
desc: Premium all-in-one leather treatment that cleans, conditions, protects and restores in a single application. Professional-grade formula for showroom-quality results.

name: Leather Cleaner
desc: Specially formulated leather cleaner that removes dirt, grime, sweat and body oils from car leather seats and interior trim without drying or damaging the surface.

name: Perfumes | Cherry, Lavender, Floral, Nucar, Apple
desc: Premium car interior perfumes in 5 luxurious scents: Cherry, Lavender, Floral, Nucar and Apple. Long-lasting fragrance that neutralises odours and keeps your car smelling fresh.

name: Quick Dry Upholstery & Carpet Shampoo
desc: Fast-drying shampoo for car seats, carpets and upholstery. Lifts stubborn stains, eliminates odours and dries quickly to prevent mould and dampness.

name: Window Cleaner
desc: Streak-free window cleaner for car windscreens, windows and mirrors. Cuts through road film, smears and fingerprints for crystal-clear visibility.

name: Claybar Kit
desc: Professional clay bar kit for removing bonded contaminants from paintwork. Includes clay bar, lubricant spray and microfibre cloths for a smooth, glass-like finish.

name: Quick Detailer Spray
desc: Fast-acting quick detailer spray for removing light dust, fingerprints and water spots between washes. Leaves a streak-free, high-gloss finish in seconds.

name: Dura Glaze
desc: Durable paint glaze that fills minor swirls and hairlines while adding a deep, wet-look shine. Suitable for use before wax or sealant application.

name: Medium-Cut Compound
desc: Medium-cut polishing compound for removing moderate swirls, light scratches and oxidation. Leaves a clean, bright finish ready for glazing or waxing.
benefits: Clean finish for wax or sealant
Suitable for machine or hand use

name: High-Cut Compound
desc: Heavy-cut polishing compound for removing deep scratches, heavy oxidation and severe swirl marks. Designed for machine polisher use on neglected or damaged paintwork.

name: Burnishing Compound
desc: Ultra-fine burnishing compound for final-stage paint finishing. Removes fine buffer trails and micro-marring left by cutting compounds, delivering a mirror-like clarity.

name: Correction Compound
desc: Professional paint correction compound formulated for multi-stage correction. Effectively removes swirls, holograms and light scratches, restoring paint depth and clarity.

name: Easy Gloss Car Polish
desc: All-in-one car polish for everyday shine maintenance. Cleans, polishes and protects in a single step, leaving a brilliant gloss that repels water and dust.

name: Blue Shampoo
desc: Professional-grade blue car wash shampoo with a rich lather that safely lifts dirt and road grime from all vehicle surfaces without stripping wax or sealants.

name: Hi Foam Shampoo (Pink)
desc: High-foam car shampoo that produces a thick, clinging foam to encapsulate and safely remove dirt, dust and road contamination from paintwork and glass.

name: Rinseless Wash
desc: Concentrated rinseless car wash that cleans the entire vehicle using only a small amount of water and a microfibre cloth. No hosing or rinsing required.

name: Waterless Car Wash
desc: Complete waterless car wash solution that cleans, polishes and protects in a single step. Simply spray on and wipe off for a spotless, scratch-free finish anywhere.

name: Wash 'N Wax (Pearly Blue)
desc: Two-in-one wash and wax shampoo with a pearly blue formula that cleans and deposits a protective wax coating in a single wash. Leaves paintwork shiny and water-beading.

name: Foam 3 Concentrate
desc: Triple-action foam concentrate that cleans, decontaminates and conditions paintwork in one application. Exceptionally concentrated — a small amount produces massive foam coverage.
